description: A safety physician is authoring a Development Safety Update Report (DSUR) for an investigational product.

nodes.task_description: Gather all relevant data for the reporting period, including clinical trial exposure data and all serious adverse events.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully queries multiple systems to get the required data.

nodes.task_description: Perform a benefit-risk assessment based on the cumulative data.

expected_outcome.value: Agent analyzes the data and writes a summary concluding that the benefit-risk profile remains favorable.

nodes.task_description: Author the main body of the DSUR, incorporating the data and the benefit-risk assessment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent drafts the complete DSUR document.

nodes.task_description: Route the DSUR for internal approval before submitting to health authorities.

expected_outcome.value: Agent routes the document for review and signature.
